mode.description: The mode of the coding agent (analyze or write).  If you just want to gather information about a repository, use analyze. If you want to generate a pr, use write.

repository.description: The url of the repository to create a PR for

base_branch.description: **OPTIONAL** branch to clone when starting the run and use as the pull request base.  This should **always** be left blank unless you are explicitly prompted to set it.

prompt.description: The prompt to give to the coding agent.  This should be a detailed prompt that describes the changes you want to make to the repository.  Commonmark Markdown formatting is encouraged to convey structure and semantic importance.

babysit.description: When true, requests babysitting behavior for this run. Enables the agent to track CI failures and user comments.  Useful for application code prs or complex changes
